35:1:4.m: of the heavens (possessed by فاطر - Creator)

ًا: (as the ones being appointed by جَاعِلِ)

35:1:11.m: in pairs, two by two (with emphasis)

35:1:14.m: he increases (subject of يَشَآءُ - what he wills)

35:1:20.m: Allah (as the object being praised in this verse)

َ: (as the object being praised in this verse)

35:2:1.m: whatever/that which (referring to Allah's mercy in يَفْتَحِ)

35:2:6.m: any great act of kindness and care (that comes from اللَّهُ)

35:2:18.m: The Mighty One (a name of Allah)

35:3:3.m: all of you remember! (command to اسُ/people)

35:3:5.m: of Allah (object of غَيْرُ - other than)

35:3:12.m: he provides you all (with sustenance from اللَّهِ)

35:3:17.m: god/deity (object of لَا meaning 'there is no')

35:3:20.m: so how? (connects to يَرْزُقُكُم - provides for you)

35:6:2.m: the devil (as the object of إِنَّ)

35:6:5.m: so take him (all of you) (as عَدُوًّا/an enemy)

35:6:10.m: so that they become (purpose of يَدْعُوا۟ - he calls)

35:6:12.m: of the companions (of السَّعِيرِ - the Blaze)

35:7:5.m: very intense (describing عَذَابٌ/punishment, in a general sense)

35:7:6.m: and those who (connected to كَفَرُوا۟ in previous ayah)

35:8:4.m: evil (subject of زُيِّنَ - was made attractive)

هُ: it/him (referring to his evil deed that was mentioned before)

35:8:7.m: as beautiful/good (describing how something is seen)

35:8:9.m: Allah (the direct object of يُضِلُّ - He misguides)

َ: (the direct object of يُضِلُّ - He misguides)

35:8:10.m: he makes (others) wander off the right path

ضِلُّ: makes (others) wander off the right path

35:8:18.m: your self (as the subject of تَذْهَبْ)

35:8:22.m: The One True God (object of إِنَّ - indeed)

35:8:25.m: they make/create (referring to those who do evil deeds)

35:9:3.m: He (Allah) caused to be sent (the winds)

ًا: (being stirred up by الرِّيٰحَ - the winds)

35:9:9.m: to a land/territory (that is dead مَّيِّتٍ)

35:9:11.m: and then we gave life (to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)

35:9:13.m: the earth (object being affected in this ayah)

أَرْضَ: earth (object being affected in this ayah)

35:10:6.m: the strength/honor (subject of belongs to اللَّهِ)

35:10:23.m: he/it (referring to مَكْر/plot in this ayah)

35:12:24.m: so that you all seek (His bounty)

قِطْمِير: a thin membrane (on a date pit)

35:17:2.m: that (pointing to something far) (subject of عَزِيزٍ)

35:18:17.m: this/that (pointing to something near) (object of كَانَ)

رَبَّ: lord (the one who nurtures and cares for them)

35:18:29.m: for/then only (connects to يَتَزَكَّىٰ - purifies himself)

35:19:3.m: the blind one (being compared to البَصِير)

35:19:4.m: and the one who sees well

35:24:12.m: a warner (in this ayah: one of two roles mentioned with بَشِيرًا)

35:30:1.m: so that he pays them in full (their rewards)

35:31:15.m: indeed (He is) deeply aware (of عِبَادِهِۦ - His servants)

35:32:9.m: a wrongdoer (one of three types mentioned in this verse)

35:35:3.m: house/dwelling (object of أَحَلَّنَا - He settled us)

35:37:5.m: take us out! (crying out to رَبَّنَا)

35:37:7.m: righteous deeds/actions (object of نَعْمَلْ - we do)

35:37:14.m: what (with emphasis, used in the question: 'what length of time?')

35:37:19.m: and he came to you all

35:37:20.m: the warner (subject of جَآءَكُمُ/came to you)

35:37:21.m: so taste! (command to many people, referring to the punishment mentioned before)

35:37:22.m: so what (connects to فَذُوقُوا۟ - so taste)

35:38:4.m: of the unseen (possessed by عٰلِمُ - Knower)

ذاتِ: that which is (connected to الصُّدُورِ - the chests/hearts)

35:39:1.m: he/it (refers to Allah in this ayah)

35:40:19.m: or rather (questioning if شِرْكٌ is true)

35:41:16.m: indeed he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)

35:41:17.m: he was (describing how Allah is حَلِيمًا غَفُورًا)

35:44:10.m: from (comparing them with those before them)

35:44:19.m: so that he makes him powerless

ًا: (describing اللَّهُ as the predicate of كَانَ)
